mechanism: When exporter stocks-to-use fall below critical thresholds (~16% for wheat), small production shortfalls (5%) trigger non-linear price spikes (30-50%), increasing the probability and severity of the agricultural supply shock that activates the Fed's trilemma.
regime_dependence: The non-linear price response is structural and operates in all regimes. Under fiscal dominance, the consequences of the price shock are amplified because the Fed's response options are constrained.
